text.title: Niche Positioning for Solo Dev Failure Modes
text.summary: Antipatterns observed in real deployments of Niche Positioning for Solo Dev. Each pairs symptom + sourced root-cause + concrete fix.

antipattern.symptom: Lane: 'Stripe integration for SaaS'; 6 months later inbound is from random verticals; no compounding referrals.
antipattern.fix: Add vertical (e.g., 'Shopify Plus stores' or 'subscription SaaS in healthcare'); rewrite headline.

antipattern.symptom: Lane chosen because it 'sounds cool'; 0 prior projects match; cold outreach yields 0%.
antipattern.root-cause: evidence-from-history rule violated; no lived projects.
antipattern.fix: Re-mine history; pick lane backed by >=3 past projects.

antipattern.symptom: Operator stuck in lane 18 months; lane underperforming for 12; no repivot trigger.
antipattern.fix: Add exit criteria (numeric threshold + date); commit to repivot if criteria fail.
